'''hochajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabiform|rabiform]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ch-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabiform|rabiform]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hochajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hochajithi|hochajithi]] || [[word:hochajiji|hochajiji]] || [[word:hochajishi|hochajishi]] || [[word:hochajiki|hochajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hochajuthuthu|hochajuthuthu]] || [[word:hochajujuju|hochajujuju]] || [[word:hochajushushu|hochajushushu]] || [[word:hochajukuku|hochajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hochajuthu|hochajuthu]] || [[word:hochajuju|hochajuju]] || [[word:hochajushu|hochajushu]] || [[word:hochajuku|hochajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hochajufthuf|hochajufthuf]] || [[word:hochajufjuf|hochajufjuf]] || [[word:hochajufshuf|hochajufshuf]] || [[word:hochajufkuf|hochajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hochajethe|hochajethe]] || [[word:hochajeje|hochajeje]] || [[word:hochajeshe|hochajeshe]] || [[word:hochajeke|hochajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hochajothotho|hochajothotho]] || [[word:hochajojojo|hochajojojo]] || [[word:hochajoshosho|hochajoshosho]] || [[word:hochajokoko|hochajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hochajotho|hochajotho]] || [[word:hochajojo|hochajojo]] || [[word:hochajosho|hochajosho]] || [[word:hochajoko|hochajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hochajofthof|hochajofthof]] || [[word:hochajofjof|hochajofjof]] || [[word:hochajofshof|hochajofshof]] || [[word:hochajofkof|hochajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hochajïfthïf|hochajïfthïf]] || [[word:hochajïfjïf|hochajïfjïf]] || [[word:hochajïfshïf|hochajïfshïf]] || [[word:hochajïfkïf|hochajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hochajïfthïfthïf|hochajïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:hochajïfjïfjïf|hochajïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:hochajïfshïfshïf|hochajïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:hochajïfkïfkïf|hochajïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hochajïfthïf|hochajïfthïf]] || [[word:hochajïfjïf|hochajïfjïf]] || [[word:hochajïfshïf|hochajïfshïf]] || [[word:hochajïfkïf|hochajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hochajïfthïf|hochajïfthïf]] || [[word:hochajïfjïf|hochajïfjïf]] || [[word:hochajïfshïf|hochajïfshïf]] || [[word:hochajïfkïf|hochajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hochajæthæ|hochajæthæ]] || [[word:hochajæjæ|hochajæjæ]] || [[word:hochajæshæ|hochajæshæ]] || [[word:hochajækæ|hochajækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hochajathatha|hochajathatha]] || [[word:hochajajaja|hochajajaja]] || [[word:hochajashasha|hochajashasha]] || [[word:hochajakaka|hochajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hochajatha|hochajatha]] || [[word:hochajaja|hochajaja]] || [[word:hochajasha|hochajasha]] || [[word:hochajaka|hochajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hochajafthaf|hochajafthaf]] || [[word:hochajafjaf|hochajafjaf]] || [[word:hochajafshaf|hochajafshaf]] || [[word:hochajafkaf|hochajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hochajasha|hochajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hochajshësha|hochajshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hochajrosha|hochajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hochajmusha|hochajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hochajyasha|hochajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohochajnkshësha|gohochajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohochajnkrosha|gohochajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohochajnkmusha|gohochajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohochajnkyasha|gohochajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hochachajasha|hochachajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hochachajshësha|hochachajshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hochachajrosha|hochachajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hochachajmusha|hochachajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hochachajyasha|hochachajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohochachajnkshësha|gohochachajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohochachajnkrosha|gohochachajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohochachajnkmusha|gohochachajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohochachajnkyasha|gohochachajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hechæjasha|hechæjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hechæjshësha|hechæjshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hechæjrosha|hechæjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hechæjmusha|hechæjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hechæjyasha|hechæjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohechæjnkshësha|gohechæjnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohechæjnkrosha|gohechæjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohechæjnkmusha|gohechæjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohechæjnkyasha|gohechæjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hochfajasha|hochfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hochfajshësha|hochfajshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hochfajrosha|hochfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hochfajmusha|hochfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hochfajyasha|hochfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohochfajnkshësha|gohochfajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohochfajnkrosha|gohochfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohochfajnkmusha|gohochfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohochfajnkyasha|gohochfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
